title: File Processing and Exception Handling
summary: 9618 P4 — file I/O, validation, and try/catch exception handling.
learningObjectives: Read and write text files in pseudocode.

simpleExplanation.title: Files and graceful errors
simpleExplanation.summary: Programs often read external files. Exception handling catches runtime errors so the program can respond instead of crashing.
steps: Check file exists and format valid.
TRY risky code; CATCH handle error.
Log message and recover or exit safely.

sections.content: **File processing** (20.2) follows **20.1 paradigms**. Examiners test **pseudocode file loops** and **exception blocks**.
